summary: UX Improvements VERIFIED - (1) Preprocessing toasts working correctly for Missing Values, Feature Scaling, and Outlier Treatment radio changes. (2) Anomaly Detection section has full explanatory narration including method descriptions, threshold hints, interpretation of results, and descriptions for all charts/tables.

critical_code_review_comments: PreprocessView.js update function (line 40-49) correctly shows toast on radio changes using sonner library with 1500ms duration
SmallViews.js AnomaliesView has methodExplanations object with Z-Score and IQR descriptions
Threshold hint text dynamically changes based on threshold value (Strict/Standard/Lenient)
Interpretation box provides contextual explanation based on anomaly count and rate
All chart sections (scatter, per-column, flagged rows) have descriptive text explaining what they show
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Loan Approval sample dataset
context_for_next_testing_agent: UX improvements fully verified. (1) Preprocessing toasts work via sonner library - toast.success() called in update() function with labels for missingValues, scaling, outlierMethod. (2) Anomaly Detection has full narration: methodExplanations object provides Z-Score/IQR descriptions, thresholdHint function provides Strict/Standard/Lenient hints, interpretation box after results explains what anomalies mean, all charts/tables have description paragraphs. Note: Anomalies nav item only appears after selecting a target column.
